_description: Nested directory tree of output/data/. Each leaf is {size_bytes, type, themes, publication_export}. Regenerate with: python3 src/tools/generate_data_index.py

_themes.daynight: Day-night asymmetry analysis (significance, exposure, asymmetry curves)
_themes.hep: hep neutrino discovery analysis (profile-likelihood significance, exposure)
_themes.sensitivity: Oscillation parameter sensitivity (chi2 scan, contours, best cuts)
_themes.signal: Signal processing and fiducialization (rebin arrays, cut masks, weights)
_themes.detector: Detector characterization diagnostics (PDS, TPC, vertex, preselection)
_themes.fiducial: Fiducial volume optimization (scan DataFrames, best-fiducial JSON)
